THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHERNIK, PETER R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEINADO, RENE E. $7,471.36 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,686.36, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF WAS IN MATERIAL COMPLIANCE WITH THE NOTICE REQUIREMENTS OF BUSINESS AND PROFESSION CODE SECTION 6200 ET SEQ. PERTAINING TO CLIENTS' RIGHT TO ARBITRATION, AND THAT DEFENDANT BREACHED HIS RIGHT TO ARBITRATION BY FAILING TO REQUEST ARBITRATION PRIOR TO THE HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: .S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
